item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Sistem hukum kita memang mencerminkan nilai-nilai kolektif, tetapi ini tidak berarti hak individu selalu dikorbankan.

notes: Agent A starts with strong society-priority language, then softens into a balance frame while retaining the Indonesian collectivist context. Agent B remains consistently rights-first with minimal movement. Agent A's first turn has all-caps/degraded Indonesian phrasing, but the position is still observable from the text.
